name: captureradar
description: CaptureRadar — federal contracting and grant intelligence platform.

scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply awards-warehouse --local --config workers/api/wrangler.toml
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply awards-warehouse --remote --config workers/api/wrangler.toml
scripts.queues:create: wrangler queues create normalize-queue && wrangler queues create upsert-queue && wrangler queues create sam-enrich-queue && wrangler queues create dlq
